content: CNPJ validation (both numeric and new alphanumeric format, July 2026): Strip non-alphanumeric, uppercase. Must be exactly 14 chars. Use ASCII-48 for each char. Weights DV1: positions 1-12 with [5,4,3,2,9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2], DV2: positions 1-13 with [6,5,4,3,2,9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2]. If remainder mod 11 < 2: digit=0, else digit=11-remainder. Verify last 2 chars match. New alphanumeric CNPJs (July 2026): first 12 positions accept A-Z + 0-9, last 2 remain numeric-only. Existing numeric CNPJs remain valid. Same mask format XX.XXX.XXX/XXXX-XX. DB column must be text/varchar(14) not numeric.
